query:
SELECT 
  'zooleous1@gmail.com' as email,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM courses WHERE userId = 1110004) as courses,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM study_materials WHERE userId = 1110004) as materials,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM flashcards WHERE userId = 1110004) as flashcards,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM material_questions WHERE userId = 1110004) as questions
UNION ALL
